.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reorder import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved import java.io.*; before import java.net.*;

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line assignment.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat constant assignments for MAVEN_WRAPPER_PROPERTIES_PATH and MAVEN_WRAPPER_JAR_PATH.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed unnecessary line breaks in string constant assignments.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Add space after 'if' keyword to comply with standard Java coding style.
Add space after 'if' keyword in nested conditionals for style consistency.
Add space after 'if' keyword in directory existence and creation checks.
Reformat the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Adjusted indentation and line breaks for the new Authenticator() block.

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Remove trailing empty line at the end of the file.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Removed blank line before closing brace.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation.Generated with jakarta.annotation.Generated to align with Jakarta EE namespace requirements in newer JHipster versions.
Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Replace javax.annotation.PostConstruct with jakarta.annotation.PostConstruct to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Convert multi-line string concatenation in log statement to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability.
Add CRLF_SAFE_MARKER to log statement to ensure proper log formatting with the custom CRLFLogConverter.
Update active profiles logging to show default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in the log message string to fix syntax or formatting issues.
Insert JHipster generator needle comments into the ApplicationProperties class to allow future code generation hooks.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style conventions.
Replace the legacy Hibernate5Module with Hibernate5JakartaModule to support Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ compatibility.
Remove Zalando Problem modules from Jackson configuration, likely due to dependency removal or migration to a different error handling strategy in the newer framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed imports for ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule and their corresponding @Bean methods.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot Liquibase setter with the new API method to maintain compatibility with updated Spring Boot versions.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with functional SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ / 6.0+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: public class SecurityConfiguration { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with modern Spring Security method security configuration.
Migrate from antMatchers to requestMatchers in HttpSecurity configuration to use the new functional authorization API.
Switch from custom SecurityProblemSupport to standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler for OAuth2 resource server compatibility.
Configure HttpSecurity to act as an OAuth2 Resource Server with JWT support, replacing the custom JWTConfigurer adapter.
Refactor header configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for Content Security Policy, Frame Options, and Permissions Policy.
Replace the explicit CorsFilter injection with a SpaWebFilter added after BasicAuthenticationFilter, adapting to the new filter chain structure.
Remove the separate WebSecurity ignoring configuration and integrate static resource permissions into the main SecurityFilterChain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed configure(WebSecurity web) method; added .requestMatchers("/app/**").permitAll() etc.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Source Content Security Policy directives from JHipsterProperties instead of hardcoding them in the security configuration.
Update the Feature Policy to the newer Permissions Policy standard with updated syntax and directives.
Restrict access to OpenAPI/Swagger documentation endpoints to administrators only.
Explicitly permit GET and POST methods for the /api/authenticate endpoint instead of allowing all methods.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed RESOURCE_LOCATIONS from including 'classpath:/static/app/' to just 'classpath:/static/'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for better static resource resolution.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced RESOURCE_PATHS array with specific patterns like '/*.js', '/*.css', '/*.svg', '/*.png', '*.ico', '/content/**', and '/i18n/*'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 / OpenAPI 3 endpoints instead of legacy Swagger 2 paths.
